raw_consumer_statement:
I am a XXXX filing this complaint against Citibank regarding a {$1400.00} charge ( Merchant : XXXX  XXXX ). This process was handled entirely via telephone with bank staff, whose persistent human and technical errors have denied my consumer rights. 
Key Points of Negligence : 1. Incorrect Categorization : I initially filed this as a " cancellation, '' but I formally requested staff to change it to " Merchandise Not Received '' ( as documented in my attached letters from XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX ). The bank 's staff failed to update the category, leading them to demand an impossible " credit slip '' instead of proof of delivery from the merchant. 
2. Internal Duplication : Bank staff opened two duplicate disputes for the same charge ( Case IDs : XXXX and XXXX ). On XX/XX/XXXX, the bank admitted in writing this was an error. This duplication caused a technical conflict that blocked my case and made the dispute disappear from my online portal. 
3. Misleading Guidance : I was repeatedly told by staff to " call back in 7 days, '' which I did religiously. These delays, caused by the banks own staff and their duplicate filings, are now being used against me to claim the " timeframe has passed. '' 4. Automated Failure : Because of the duplicate cases opened by staff, the system automatically closed the investigation as a " loss '' rather than resolving the technical error. 
I have acted in good faith, provided chronological proof, and repeatedly tried to correct the bank 's errors. I request a senior executive review of the attached letters and the permanent reversal of this charge.
